description: Virtual loopback MIDI port (Tobias Erichsen loopMIDI). Non-portable (-np): runs the vendor installer; driver under Program Files (x86).
notes: Package name ends with -np (non-portable): Scoop downloads the zip and runs the vendor setup. The driver installs under %ProgramFiles(x86)%\Tobias Erichsen\loopMIDI, not under the Scoop app directory.
Prefer installing from an elevated PowerShell if UAC/setup fails. Uninstall runs the Inno uninstaller in that folder.

uninstaller.script: $pf86 = ${env:ProgramFiles(x86)}; $d = Join-Path $pf86 'Tobias Erichsen\loopMIDI'; $u = Get-ChildItem $d -Filter 'unins*.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -ne $u) { Start-Process $u.FullName -ArgumentList '/VERYSILENT','/SUPPRESSMSGBOXES','/NORESTART' -Wait } else { warn 'loopMIDI uninstaller not found; use Windows Settings or the Start Menu shortcut if present.' }
